title: Questionnaire
description: A template's questionnaire state machine. Each top-level key is a state name; each value is a TransitionMap of condition → next-state-name. BEGIN and END are reserved sentinel state names. The unconditional transition uses '_' as its condition.

StateName.description: A state name. 'BEGIN' and 'END' are reserved sentinels. Non-sentinel names may include a kind prefix separated from the suffix by '__' (e.g. 'staff_review__for_trustee').

Condition.description: A transition condition. The unconditional edge uses '_'; other transitions can carry application-specific labels (e.g. 'yes', 'no').

TransitionMap.description: The outgoing edges of a single state, keyed by condition.
